final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original product shot of a single piece of chocolate.

Style/medium: photorealistic close-up product photography, clean studio aesthetic
Composition: centered single subject, slight three-quarter angle, macro lens, shallow depth of field
Subject: one piece of dark chocolate, smooth glossy surface with a subtle snap edge, rich brown tone
Scene/backdrop: minimal neutral background, soft surface reflection beneath the chocolate
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio light from upper-left, gentle specular highlight on the chocolate surface, warm and indulgent mood
Color palette: deep chocolate brown as dominant tone, warm ivory or cream as background, subtle golden highlight accent
Materials/textures: smooth tempered chocolate shell with a faint sheen, clean sharp edges
Avoid: plastic appearance, over-saturated color, cluttered background, watermark
